texto: If you don't follow through on your creative ideas, someone else will pick them up and use them. When you get an idea of this sort, you should jump in with both feet, not just stick your toe in the water… Be daring, be fearless, and don't be afraid that somebody is going to criticize you or laugh at you. If your ego is not involved no-one can hurt you.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Guru R.H.H. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “If you don't follow through on your creative ideas, someone else will pick them up and use them. …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, buddhism, creativity, útil em momentos de inspiracao e creativity.
